items.what_it_is: A short baseline/post reasoning check for practical trend interpretation.
items.caveats: Brief form for tracking, not high-stakes diagnostic use.

items.what_it_is: Self-report marker for applied cognition patterns in daily contexts.
items.how_it_is_measured: Repeatable scale responses with trend interpretation.
items.caveats: Validation remains in testing; interpret as practical tracking signal.

items.what_it_is: Behavioural throughput signal used for readiness and route setting.
items.how_it_is_measured: Multiple Function Task (masked), or MFT-m, using brief masked trials and throughput estimation.
items.caveats: Practical readiness and dose signal, not an IQ score or diagnostic measure.
